name: Doug Silkstone
title: Lead Full Stack Software Engineer
about: 15 years across engineering, product, and growth. 3x exits as solo founder. Took a gaming studio from zero to 1M players as Lead Growth Engineer. LLM tooling featured in MIT's Generative AI course (50,000+ students). Currently building automation tooling, agentic workflows, and Source 2 game mods. Strong track record scaling data-heavy consumer platforms and converting free users to paid.

highlights: Full-stack platform with React 18, strict TypeScript, GraphQL API, and LLM-powered admin workflows
Growth infrastructure: conversion funnels, A/B testing, SEO-optimized content, email automation
Revenue dashboards with real-time analytics. Stripe Connect monetisation for franchise model
CI/CD pipeline with automated testing, monitoring, and alerting
Led greenfield in-house Game Studio for top-three social casino from zero to 1M players
Built MVP game delivery mechanism and five high-stakes casino games
Growth loops: onboarding optimisation, retention mechanics, viral sharing, conversion funnels
Hired and led nine-member team across frontend, backend, and QA
Built SaaS protecting 25M+ monthly sessions — real-time detection and analytics at scale
Onboarded 80+ brands. Led technical sales with C-Suite directors. Commercially exited 2023
Consultancy across Contra.com, Sky, Groupon, The Motley Fool, Framer, and MIT
Author of open-source automation NPM packages. LLM tooling featured in MIT's GenAI course (50K+ students)
Lead engineer for affiliate automation covering 10,000+ brands; 250k monthly sessions
Built scraping and data pipeline infrastructure at scale. Sold to PE investors 2021
Go-to-market for AR gaming robot launched in Apple Stores globally. Hired and led cross-functional team
Built React internal tools saving 240 monthly hours, cutting SEM team overhead by 40%
